tasks.subject: Task 1: Data layer â€” type and API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `Task` carries an optional `reflections` field; the archive API endpoint populates it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/types/index.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Task` type has `reflections?: TaskReflection[]`
- [ ] `GET /api/tasks?done=true` response includes a `reflections` array on each task (latest first, max 1 entry)
- [ ] `GET /api/tasks` (without `done=true`) does NOT include reflections
- [ ] TypeScript build passes: `npx tsc --noEmit`

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` â†’ no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types/index.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Task type has reflections?: TaskReflection[]", "GET /api/tasks?done=true includes reflections", "GET /api/tasks without done=true does not include reflections", "TypeScript build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ArchiveTaskItem component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A self-contained component that renders an archived task row with expand-to-see-reflection behaviour, a reflection icon indicator, and icon-only restore/delete buttons.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/tasks/ArchiveTaskItem.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/tasks/ArchiveTaskItem.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] BookOpen icon visible only when task.reflections has at least one entry
- [ ] Clicking the row toggles open/closed
- [ ] Expanded view shows only non-null reflection fields
- [ ] No reflection section rendered when reflections is empty or undefined
- [ ] Restore/delete buttons call correct callbacks and do not toggle expand
- [ ] 7 test cases pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/tasks/ArchiveTaskItem.test.tsx` â†’ 7 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/tasks/ArchiveTaskItem.tsx", "src/components/tasks/ArchiveTaskItem.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/tasks/ArchiveTaskItem.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BookOpen icon visible only when reflections present", "Row click toggles expand", "Only non-empty fields render", "No reflection section when no reflections", "7 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire ArchiveTaskItem into archive page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The archive page uses ArchiveTaskItem instead of the inline <li>, completing the feature end-to-end.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/archive/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Archive page renders ArchiveTaskItem for each task
- [ ] No inline task <li> remains in archive/page.tsx
- [ ] Full test suite passes
- [ ] TypeScript build passes

**Verify:** `npx vitest run` â†’ all tests pass, `npx tsc --noEmit` â†’ no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/archive/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Archive page uses ArchiveTaskItem", "No inline li remains", "All tests pass", "TypeScript clean"]}
```
